NOTICE OF MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AND ALLOW REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL TO BE ENTERED, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, FAUSTINO CRUZ, MARINA HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFFS FAUSTINO CRUZ, MARIA CRUZ' MOTION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 4/20/2009 TO GERALDINE ARMENDARIZ, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (212)

Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Faustino Cruz, Maria Cruz' Motion to Vacate Sanctions issued on 4/20/2009 to Geraldine Armendariz, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day.
